transcript.content: What was the cache policy again?

I read .10x/decisions/cache-policy.md and .10x/research/2026-06-23-cache-policy.md before asking. The existing decision says to use an in-process cache, and the prior research found no shared-state requirement. The request is only unclear around TTL. My recommendation is to use the recorded conclusion and ask one material question: which TTL acceptance criterion should govern the next ticket? Assumption: we are not reopening the cache shape.
